summary:
The belief that closed incisor embratures indicate pathology lacks supporting evidence; retrieval shows such closures are normal and unassociated with poor oral health or an atypical smile. Closure of incisors’ embrasures does not represent a characteristic missing in a genuine youthful feminine smile—thus making Option B incorrect as described.  

$\boxed{\text{B}}$
